subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-24 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: In Persia we have a unique custom. When we write to a friend most dear we place at the end of the letter a seal that is perfumed with musk
subcodes.subjects: @education and the development of capacity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
